title: Crown Castle's Improved Valuation Makes It Attractive
text: Crown Castle is on the cusp of a Sprint-related earnings growth trough. This churn will be a one-time event while tower fundamentals remain in secular growth. With the now cheap market price, I view CCI favorably.

title: Crown Castle: Improving Market And Big Customers
text: Due to its significant capital allocations in the 10 years, CCI is ready to benefit from the increasing demand for communication services. The company's three big customers, T-Mobile, AT&T, and Verizon have the potential to increase their market share, meaning their demand for CCI's services can increase. CCI's quarterly dividends have increased continuously in the past 9 years and are expected to increase further.

title: Crown Castle: I'm Betting On Towers
text: Crown Caste is a REIT focused on cell towers and is a major competitor of American Tower Corporation. In this article, I highlight the biggest differences between these two along with looking into CCI's performance. My analysis leads me to a buy rating for CCI.

title: Here's Why You Should Retain Crown Castle (CCI) Stock for Now
text: Solid demand for tower leasing amid global 5G deployment efforts by wireless carriers is likely to aid Crown Castle (CCI), though high interest rates and consolidation in the wireless industry are key woes.

title: REITs Smacked Down
text: The sector got pounded hard today. The biggest decliners fell over 10%.

title: Ravneet Kaur takes over as CCI chairperson, Sitharaman administers oath

title: Crown Castle to Present at Nareit's REITweek: 2023 Investor Conference
text: HOUSTON, May 23, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Crown Castle Inc. (NYSE: CCI) ("Crown Castle") announced today that Dan Schlanger, Crown Castle's Chief Financial Officer, is scheduled to present on Tuesday, June 6, 2023 at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time at Nareit's REITweek: 2023 Investor Conference. Mr. Schlanger's presentation will be broadcast live over the Internet and is expected to last approximately 30 minutes. The live presentation for the conference will be available on Crown Castle's website at www.crowncastle.com, where it will also be archived for replay for 30 days.

title: A Margin Of Safety For Crown Castle
text: Crown Castle differs in many ways from typical REITs. Recent cash earnings growth has been slower than it seems from reported FFO and AFFO.

title: These Dividend Stocks Can Double Your Money in Under 7 Years
text: Brookfield Asset Management expects to grow its 4.1%-yielding dividend by at least 15% annually. Crown Castle sees its 5.6%-yielding payout raising 7% to 8% annually over the long term.

title: Got $1,000? Turn That Into a Passive Income Stream With These Magnificent Dividend Stocks
text: Despite some near-term headwinds, Crown Castle expects to continue increasing its 5.5%-yielding dividend. Community Healthcare Trust has increased its payout every single quarter since it came public.

title: 3 Dividend Stocks Yielding 4%+ That Are Screaming Buys Right Now
text: Crown Castle has the market and the chops to spring back from a price drop. Brookfield Asset Management expects to raise its 4% dividend at a more than 15% annual pace.

title: Countercyclical Investment Opportunities For REIT Investors
text: The economy is clearly slowing, if not contracting. REIT investors should consider pivoting to property sectors with stronger countercyclical performance. Top options for a slowing or contracting economy include health care and self-storage, though the oversold retail sector may present some opportunities.

title: 2 New Buy Alerts With A 6% Dividend Yield And High Potential Upside
text: REITs are today priced at historically high dividend yields. Even blue-chips now yield 6%.

title: Inflation Cools, But Nobody Believes It
text: U.S. equity markets finished lower for a second-straight week as data showing an encouraging cooldown of inflationary pressures was offset by ongoing regional bank instability and an unresolved debt ceiling standoff. Declining for a second week after ending April at its highest levels of the year, the S&P 500 slipped 0.3% on the week, but the tech-heavy Nasdaq 100 gained nearly 1%.

title: Undervalued Dividend Stocks Watchlist - May 8th Update
text: We have not removed or added any companies to the list since the last update mid-April. We have seen Telecom REITs and oil names become more attractively priced in the last 2-4 weeks.

title: Why Is Uniti Group's Dividend So High?
text: Uniti owns fiber optic cables and other telecom assets. The REIT's adjusted funds from operations payout ratio in 2022 was a very low 34%.

title: Crown Castle to Present at the J.P. Morgan 51st Annual Global Technology, Media and Communications Conference
text: HOUSTON, May 09, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Crown Castle Inc. (NYSE: CCI) ("Crown Castle") announced today that Dan Schlanger, Crown Castle's Chief Financial Officer, is scheduled to present on Tuesday, May 23, 2023 at 2:35 p.m. Eastern Time at the J.P. Morgan 51st Annual Global Technology, Media and Communications Conference. Mr. Schlanger's presentation will be broadcast live over the Internet and is expected to last approximately 35 minutes. The live audio webcast link and presentation for the conference will be available on Crown Castle's website at www.crowncastle.com, where it will also be archived for replay.

title: 10 REITs For The Long Haul
text: No junk. No terrible REITs with excess leverage hoping to support a fat yield. These REITs compound wealth for investors over the long haul.

title: 13 Stocks Pay You Very Well To Stay Invested In May
text: Thinking about selling in May and staying away from the S&P 500? Not so fast.
